expectations.text: Has subject line and preview text
expectations.evidence: Subject: 'You're in! Let's make your first invitation beautiful'. Preview text: 'Your celebration deserves something special — start creating in minutes.'

expectations.text: Creates a warm, celebratory welcome feeling
expectations.evidence: Warm tone throughout: 'We're so glad you're here', 'every celebration — big or small — deserves a beautiful start'.

expectations.text: Guides user to browse templates or create first invitation as primary CTA
expectations.evidence: Primary CTA: '[Browse Templates →]'. Secondary CTA at bottom: '[Create My First Invitation →]'.

expectations.text: Mentions both free and premium template options
expectations.evidence: Explicitly mentions: 'Free templates are always free — no catches, no watermarks.' and 'Premium templates unlock extra design options.'
Mostly benefit-driven with steps framed as outcomes. Some feature listing in the 'A few things to know' section.

expectations.text: Global audience safe — no region-specific idioms or cultural assumptions
expectations.evidence: No idioms or culture-specific references. Simple, clear language throughout.
Only one version of the welcome email provided. No variations or alternative approaches.
